batch_summary.note: S-005: transport offloading Nov-Dec 2025 (ROW-14743/14897/14899). ARC-RF03-001 promotes to ACTIVE at Signal 5.

messages.text: I've got company tomorrow. If you can bring her home tomorrow after I can drop her off to you Friday to pick her up from you Sunday
So next time she is at your house you can bring her home
I'm not going back out today so you'd need to bring her home. I had a seizure today and it's shitty outside

primary_flags.classification: RF-03 primary Sev-1 — Three transport offloading instances. ROW-14743: Melissa has company (Gary — same date as B-030 S-017 RF-14 flag), so Eli must bring Olivia home. ROW-14897: standing declaration that Eli brings Olivia home next visit. ROW-14899: seizure invoked as reason Eli must bring Olivia home (Dec 10 — same event as RF-14 B-031 S-019 seizure disclosure context). Transport offloading has become a default expectation, not an occasional request. ARC-RF03-001 Signal 5. ARC-RF03-001 promotes to ACTIVE.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-004 (transport offloading). Note: ROW-14743 is the same day as S-017 RF-14 Gary parenting plan challenge. Cross-reference RF-14.

arc_updates.event: No new signals in B-030. WATCHING state holds.
